basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar has released the official notification for 2 Project Associate I posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Gujarat. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B.C.A/B.Sc. or equivalent qualification in an appropriate discipline with a minimum of 04 years of post qualification experience, B.Tech./B.E./M.Sc. or equivalent in any discipline, Minimum 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onwards and 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th
qualification.details: Project Associate I: B.C.A/B.Sc. or equivalent qualification in an appropriate discipline with a minimum of 04 years of post qualification experience OR B.Tech./B.E./M.Sc. or equivalent in any discipline. Candidates should have a minimum 60% or equivalent grade in percentage/grade points from Graduation onwards and 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project Associate I position at IIT Gandhinagar is 13th June 2026. Ensure you complete all steps before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Project Associate I post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.C.A/B.Sc. with 4 years of experience or a B.Tech./B.E./M.Sc. in any discipline. A minimum of 60% from graduation onwards and 55% in 10th and 12th are also required.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate I position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Project Associate I role will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 45,000 to Rs. 70,000.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate I post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Project Associate I position at IIT Gandhinagar.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate I recruitment must be submitted through the online mode only.

faq.question: Q7. Where is IIT Gandhinagar located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar is located in Gandhinagar, Gujarat.

faq.question: Q8. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity for the Project Associate I position at IIT Gandhinagar.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from outside Gujarat apply?
faq.answer: The notification mentions applications from eligible candidates in Gujarat. However, it's advisable to check the detailed eligibility criteria in the official notification for any specific residency requirements.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page. It is recommended to download and read it thoroughly.
